items.title: Tempted to use buy-now-pay-later to split your rent payments? Watch out for these fees.
items.description: Want to pay rent in two installments instead of one? The fine print can make “0% interest” costlier than it sounds.

items.title: ‘We’ve been dating for 5 years’: My boyfriend’s parents say he doesn’t earn enough to marry. Should I speak to his father?
items.description: “Every year his very wealthy parents say that he needs to ‘earn more’ before he can marry me.”

items.title: Social Security could run out of money in just 6 years — even sooner than originally feared
items.description: Higher inflation and lower income taxes on benefits may weigh on the program’s trust funds.

items.title: My employer is forcing me into a Roth 401(k). Is there anything I can do?
items.description: High earners have to pay tax on their catch-up 401(k) contributions and deposit them into workplace Roth accounts.

items.title: The Dow transports’ steep takeoff isn’t the green light you’re told it is
items.description: The S&P 500 does better when the Dow industrials outperform the Dow transports.
